subcodes.first_line: O my God, O my God! I beseech Thee with my tongue and supplicate with my heart to grant unto this Thy servant an abundant portion of [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: الهی الهی انی ابتهل بلسانی و اتضرع بجنانی ان تجعل لعبدک هذا حظا موفورا من
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for spiritual recognition, @prayer for specific individuals; groups, @prayers (general or uncategorized)
